name: recipe-finder-backend
description: Backend Search API for Recipe Finder

scripts.predev: powershell -Command "$p=(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue).OwningProcess; if($p){ $p | Select-Object -Unique | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_ -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue } }"
